dialogos.texto_en: It's already evening, huh?\nTime flew by so quickly.
It was really fast,\nbut it was fun to check out all the shops,\nwasn't it?
Did you two have fun too?
Yeah, we had a lot of fun.\nI was together with\nF-Futaro the entire time.
Hmmm.
Isn't that right, Futaro?!
Y-yeah, that's right.
(As expected, Itsuki is being unusually proactive today,\n or rather, her energy level is high.\n It's not a bad thing, but it feels a bit strange...)
Hey, Itsuki.\nIs it just me, or are you acting a little strange today?
Huh? What about me is strange?
I mean, in general.
It doesn't feel like you're being the usual Itsuki-chan.
Yeah, I guess I can understand that.
It's not necessarily a bad thing, though,\nyou know?
(I see. So it's not just me,\n everyone else is thinking the same thing.)
N-no, that's not true!\nI'm the same as always!
Now, I really wonder.
Anyway, anyway,\nit's time for our long-awaited dinner!
We made a reservation,\nso let's not be late. Let's get goooiiing!
Huh, Itsuki?\nWe still have time, so we don't need to hurry%p-2;――
I've been resisting the temptation\nof delicious-looking restaurants just for this moment,\nso I can't wait any longer!
She left.
I wonder if her priority...is always food.
(It's true that her energy level\n usually goes up during meals, but...)
Anyway, let's go after her.
Yeah, let's hurry and catch up with her.
Yeah.
